voteDescription: *And here we observe **{initiator}**, raising the alarm call against **{target}**. The herd must now decide: does this one stay, or are they cast out into the wilderness?*
votePassedDescription: *And so it is. The herd has spoken. **{target}** is cast out into the silent wilderness for **{duration} minutes**. Nature is beautiful, and yet... utterly ruthless.*
voteExpiredDescription: *Fascinating. The herd chose mercy today. Only {votes}/{needed} members voted to exile **{target}**. They live to chat another day. For now.*
userMutedDescription: *With a final, mournful glance, **{target}** is separated from the group. They will wander in silence for **{duration} minutes**. Such is the way of the natural world.*
dmTitle: You've been exiled from the pack.
dmDescription: *The herd of **{server}** has voted. You have been separated from the group for **{duration} minutes**. In nature, silence is not punishment — it is reflection.*
dmTip: In a remarkable display of adaptive behavior, server boosters develop a temporary immunity to exile. Lasting approximately one hour. Evolution works in mysterious ways.
unauthorizedUnmuteDescription: *Most unusual. **{executor}** has attempted to reintroduce **{target}** to the pack prematurely. The ecosystem does not take kindly to such interference.*
selfMuteReactions: *Remarkable. The creature has voted for its own exile. In all my years of observation, I have never witnessed such behavior.*
*And here we see a rare phenomenon — self-imposed isolation. Scientists remain baffled.*
*The specimen appears to be... volunteering to leave? David, are you seeing this?*
*Extraordinary. This one has chosen solitude. Perhaps it knows something the rest of the herd does not.*
*In a stunning display of self-awareness rarely seen in the wild, the creature silences itself.*
